suggested_workflow.complete_code_for_action_derived_from_th: async with aiohttp.ClientSession() as session: async with session.post(f"{TEAMCITY_URL}/id:{id}", json=payload) as response: if response.status != 200: return jsonify({"error": "Failed to cancel build"}), response.status return jsonify({"message": "Build canceled successfully"})
